mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN SELLER_EMAIL = #{myEmail} THEN BUYER_EMAIL ELSE SELLER_EMAIL END FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
SELECT PRODUCT_NO FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORTS ( REPORT_ID, REPORTER_EMAIL, TARGET_EMAIL, TYPE_ID, PRODUCT_NUM, ROOM_ID, NOSQL_MSG_KEY, REPORT_DETAIL, REPORT_STATUS, REPORT_DATE, REPORT_IMG ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPORT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{reporterEmail}, #{targetEmail}, #{typeId}, #{productNum, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{roomId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nosqlMsgKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportContent}, '접수', SYSDATE, #{reportImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
